parameters.query:
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- MULTI-DESTINATION : une ligne par niveau d'escalade actif
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        t.XNUM_0        AS numero_attestation,
        t.CREDATTIM_0   AS date_creation_attestation,
        t.YDATCON_0     AS date_controle,
        t.CREUSR_0      AS utilisateur_createur,
        P.VALEUR_0      AS delai_total_jours,

        COALESCE(x_direct.XSAL_0,   x_mapping.XSAL_0)   AS code_salarie,
        COALESCE(x_direct.XNAMSAL_0,x_mapping.XNAMSAL_0) AS nom_salarie,
        COALESCE(x_direct.XPRENOM_0,x_mapping.XPRENOM_0) AS prenom_salarie,
        'gestionnaire.des.demandes.du.personnel@jbel-annour.ma'  AS email_salarie,
        COALESCE(x_direct.YTELE_0,  x_mapping.YTELE_0)   AS num_telephone_salarie,
        COALESCE(x_direct.YSUP_0,   x_mapping.YSUP_0)    AS code_superieur,

        xx.XSAL_0    AS code_sup,
        xx.XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_superieur,
        xx.XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_superieur,
        xx.XEMAIL_0  AS email_superieur,
        xx.YTELE_0   AS num_telephone_sup,

        pdg.XSAL_0   AS code_pdg,    pdg.XNAMSAL_0  AS nom_pdg,
        pdg.XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_pdg, pdg.XEMAIL_0   AS email_pdg,
        pdg.YTELE_0  AS telephone_pdg,

        dga.XSAL_0   AS code_dga,    dga.XNAMSAL_0  AS nom_dga,
        dga.XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_dga, dga.XEMAIL_0   AS email_dga,
        dga.YTELE_0  AS telephone_dga,

        farhat.XSAL_0   AS code_farhat,    farhat.XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_farhat,
        farhat.XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_farhat, farhat.XEMAIL_0  AS email_farhat,
        farhat.YTELE_0  AS telephone_farhat,

        baallah.XSAL_0   AS code_baallah,    baallah.XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_baallah,
        baallah.XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_baallah, baallah.XEMAIL_0  AS email_baallah,
        baallah.YTELE_0  AS telephone_baallah,

        -- Infos IA : salarie
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(x_direct.XSAL_0, x_mapping.XSAL_0)) AS chat_id_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(x_direct.XSAL_0, x_mapping.XSAL_0)) AS langue_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(x_direct.XSAL_0, x_mapping.XSAL_0)) AS bot_salarie,
        -- sup
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS langue_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS bot_superieur,
        -- pdg
        '8528101210'  AS chat_id_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0  FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS langue_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS bot_pdg,
        -- dga
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_dga,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS langue_dga,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS bot_dga,
        -- farhat
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS langue_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS bot_farhat,
        -- baallah
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS langue_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS bot_baallah,

        DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), t.CREDATTIM_0)                                       AS date_limite,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, t.CREDATTIM_0, GETDATE())                                                     AS jours_depuis_creation,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), t.CREDATTIM_0))             AS jours_restants,
        CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT)                                                                     AS delai_int

    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XATT t
        LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL x_direct ON x_direct.XSAL_0 = t.CREUSR_0
        LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.YSALAUS s     ON s.USER_0 = t.CREUSR_0
        LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL x_mapping ON x_mapping.XSAL_0 = s.XSAL_0
        LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL xx ON xx.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(x_direct.YSUP_0, x_mapping.YSUP_0)
        CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 VALEUR_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.ADOVAL WHERE PARAM_0 = 'YDELPJATT') P
        CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0066') pdg
        CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0949') dga
        CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S1602') farhat
        CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0179') baallah
    WHERE 
        t.CREDATTIM_0 >= '2024-01-01'
        AND t.CREDATTIM_0 >= DATEADD(DAY, -CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), GETDATE())
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT * FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.AOBJTXT
            WHERE t.XNUM_0 = AOBJTXT.IDENT1_0 AND AOBJTXT.ABREV_0 = 'XATT'
        )
)

-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- EXPANSION : une ligne par destination active
-- Les conditions se CUMULENT (pas de CASE exclusif)
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

-- SALARIE  → jours_restants = 4
SELECT *, 'SALARIE' AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 4

UNION ALL

-- SUPERIEUR → jours_restants = 3
SELECT *, 'SUPERIEUR' AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 3

UNION ALL

-- FARHAT   → jours_restants entre 5 et 8 (inclus)
SELECT *, 'FARHAT'    AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants BETWEEN 5 AND 8

UNION ALL

-- DGA      → jours_restants <= délai/2
--            CHEVAUCHE FARHAT quand délai/2 est dans [5..8]
SELECT *, 'DGA'       AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= (delai_int / 2)
                                                       AND jours_restants > 4   -- déjà couverts par SUP/SAL/PDG

UNION ALL

-- BAALLAH  → jours_restants <= délai/2 (même seuil que DGA)
SELECT *, 'BAALLAH'   AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= (delai_int / 2)
                                                       AND jours_restants > 4   -- déjà couverts par SUP/SAL/PDG

UNION ALL

-- PDG      → jours_restants <= 2
SELECT *, 'PDG'       AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 2

ORDER BY jours_restants ASC, niveau_escalade DESC;

nodes.name: Vérifier Données Présentes3
nodes.notes: Stoppe le workflow si aucune donnée

nodes.name: Structuration par Destinataire3
nodes.notes: Groupe les attestations par destinataire avec escalade automatique (+ DGA + BAALLAH)

nodes.name: Génération Messages Multilingues3
nodes.notes: Génère les messages en FRA/ARA/ENG selon le destinataire (+ DGA + BAALLAH)

nodes.name: Envoi Email3
nodes.notes: Envoi email avec CC selon escalade

nodes.name: Envoi Telegram Principal3
nodes.notes: Envoi au destinataire principal (DGA exclu = chat_id null, BAALLAH selon chat_id DB)
